results.description: Baseline with verbose skill (296 lines, 11 auxiliary files)
Optimized: condensed SKILL.md to 45 lines, removed all auxiliary files, added explicit mutex pattern and test-import-checking guidance

changes: Reduced SKILL.md from 296 lines to 45 lines — removed philosophical content, rationalizations tables, and process phases
Removed 10 auxiliary files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, etc.) not needed for these tasks
Kept direct, actionable guidance: step-by-step process, common bug patterns with code examples, and clear rules
Added explicit step to check test file imports for correct output filename
Preserved mutex/lock pattern code snippet for race condition fixes
